drafts.title: ACS Reassessment — When's Yours Due?
drafts.content:
When's your ACS reassessment due?

If you're Gas Safe registered, your ACS needs renewing every 5 years. Let it lapse and you can't work on gas. Simple as that.

We run CCN1 reassessment courses here in High Wycombe. It covers everything you need to stay certified and keep working. Theory, practical fault-finding, ventilation, and the full assessment.

Small class sizes. Assessors who've actually been out on the tools. No travelling halfway across the country to sit in a packed room.

We're based at HP11 2LB, easy to get to from Reading, Aylesbury, and anywhere along the M40.

Your ACS is your livelihood. Don't leave it until the last minute.

Better Training Solutions, High Wycombe
Get in touch to book your reassessment.

drafts.title: Heat Pump Training Now Running in High Wycombe
drafts.content:
Heat pump training now running in High Wycombe

Heat pump installations are growing fast and there aren't enough qualified engineers to keep up. If you're already gas qualified, you've got a head start. Your existing knowledge of heating systems carries straight across.

We run heat pump training from our centre in High Wycombe. Small groups, hands-on with actual units, and instructors who've done the job for real.

Based at HP11 2LB on the M40 corridor. Easy to reach from Reading, Aylesbury, Maidenhead, and across Buckinghamshire.

If you want to add heat pumps to what you can offer, get in touch and we'll sort you out with the next available date.

Better Training Solutions, High Wycombe
Call or message us to check dates.

drafts.title: Water Regulations Course Running in High Wycombe
drafts.content:
Water Regulations course running in High Wycombe

If you work on water systems in England and Wales, you need to know the Water Supply (Water Fittings) Regulations 1999. Water companies can prosecute for non-compliant work. It's not something you can blag.

Our WRAS-recognised course covers backflow prevention, approved materials, and what the regulations actually require in practice. Theory and practical, not just sitting through slides.

It's a good one to pair with our G3 unvented hot water course and Legionella course. All three run from the same centre. You could pick up three qualifications in one week if you wanted to.

We're in High Wycombe, HP11 2LB. Straightforward to get to from Reading, Aylesbury, Slough, and the rest of Buckinghamshire.

Better Training Solutions, High Wycombe
Get in touch to check when the next course is running.

drafts.title: Gas and Plumbing Training in High Wycombe — No London Commute
drafts.content:
Gas and plumbing training in High Wycombe. No London commute.

Sick of travelling into London for a training course? We run gas, plumbing, and heat pump courses right here in High Wycombe on the M40 corridor.

What we've got running:

ACS Initial and Reassessment (CCN1)
Gas Managed Learning Programme
Water Regulations (WRAS)
Unvented Hot Water (G3)
Legionella Prevention
Domestic Cookers
Domestic Fires and Space Heaters
Heat Pump Training
Better Heating Course

Small groups. Hands-on training. Instructors who've been out on the tools, not just read about it in a book.

We're at 1 Marlborough Trading Estate, West Wycombe Road, High Wycombe HP11 2LB. Easy from Reading, Aylesbury, Maidenhead, Marlow, and anywhere in Bucks or Berks.

Better Training Solutions
Get in touch for dates and availability.
